mapper.select:
SELECT IB.INSTR_USER_ID AS INSTR_USER_ID, M.USER_NAME AS INSTR_USER_NM, COUNT(*) AS TOTAL_CNT, SUM(CASE WHEN IQ.ANSW_YN = 'Y' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS ANSWERED_CNT, SUM(CASE WHEN NVL(IQ.ANSW_YN, 'N') = 'N' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS UNANSWERED_CNT, ROUND( SUM(CASE WHEN IQ.ANSW_YN = 'Y' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0) , 1) AS ANSWER_RATE, ROUND( AVG(CASE WHEN IQ.ANSW_YN = 'Y' THEN (CAST(IQ.ANSW_DT AS DATE) - CAST(IB.REG_DT AS DATE)) * 24 ELSE NULL END) , 1) AS AVG_RESPONSE_HOURS FROM INSTRUCTOR_BOARD IB LEFT JOIN INSTRUCTOR_QNA IQ ON IQ.POST_SN = IB.POST_SN INNER JOIN MEMBER M ON IB.INSTR_USER_ID = M.USER_ID WHERE 1=1
GROUP BY IB.INSTR_USER_ID, M.USER_NAME ORDER BY ANSWER_RATE DESC

SELECT COUNT(*) AS TOTAL_CNT, SUM(CASE WHEN IQ.ANSW_YN = 'Y' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS ANSWERED_CNT, ROUND( SUM(CASE WHEN IQ.ANSW_YN = 'Y' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0) , 1) AS ANSWER_RATE, ROUND( AVG(CASE WHEN IQ.ANSW_YN = 'Y' THEN (CAST(IQ.ANSW_DT AS DATE) - CAST(IB.REG_DT AS DATE)) * 24 ELSE NULL END) , 1) AS AVG_RESPONSE_HOURS, SUM(CASE WHEN NVL(IQ.ANSW_YN, 'N') = 'N' AND (SYSDATE - CAST(IB.REG_DT AS DATE)) * 24 > 24 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS OVERDUE_CNT FROM INSTRUCTOR_BOARD IB LEFT JOIN INSTRUCTOR_QNA IQ ON IQ.POST_SN = IB.POST_SN WHERE 1=1

SELECT IB.POST_SN AS POST_SN, IB.POST_SJ AS POST_SJ, IB.REG_DT AS REG_DT, IB.INSTR_USER_ID AS INSTR_USER_ID, IM.USER_NAME AS INSTR_USER_NM, IB.WRTR_USER_ID AS WRTR_USER_ID, WM.USER_NAME AS WRTR_USER_NM, ROUND((SYSDATE - CAST(IB.REG_DT AS DATE)) * 24, 0) AS ELAPSED_HOURS FROM INSTRUCTOR_BOARD IB INNER JOIN MEMBER IM ON IB.INSTR_USER_ID = IM.USER_ID INNER JOIN MEMBER WM ON IB.WRTR_USER_ID = WM.USER_ID LEFT JOIN INSTRUCTOR_QNA IQ ON IQ.POST_SN = IB.POST_SN WHERE IB.BOARD_TYPE_CD = 'QNA' AND IB.USE_YN = 'Y' AND NVL(IQ.ANSW_YN, 'N') = 'N' AND (SYSDATE - CAST(IB.REG_DT AS DATE)) * 24 > 24 ORDER BY IB.REG_DT ASC
